nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 北美洲
nodes.summary: 北美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联97种鸟类，包括紅嘴樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、加拿大雁等97种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 马萨葡萄园岛
nodes.summary: 马萨葡萄园岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括西红脚隼，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 麻薩諸塞州
nodes.summary: 麻薩諸塞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括普通潜鸟、Chuck-will's-widow、虎头海雕等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 西红脚隼
nodes.summary: 西红脚隼（Red-footed falcon，学名 Falco vespertinus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于北美洲、马萨葡萄园岛、麻薩諸塞州，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、农药污染。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is a regular wanderer to western Europe, and in August 2004 a red-footed falcon was found in North America for the first time on the island of Martha's Vineyard, Massachusetts

links.evidence: It is a regular wanderer to western Europe, and in August 2004 a red-footed falcon was found in North America for the first time on the island of Martha's Vineyard, Massachusetts

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This bird is found in eastern Europe and Asia although its numbers are dwindling rapidly due to habitat loss and hunting

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This bird is found in eastern Europe and Asia although its numbers are dwindling rapidly due to habitat loss and hunting

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Pesticides are also a huge threat as they are depleting their natural food sources, making food competitive
